response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, multi-language expertise, and leadership in open-source projects, aligning well with the technical requirements. However, his recent career gap and limited direct AI/cloud platform experience (despite AI-agent infrastructure contributions) reduce his fit for this highly specialized role. His entrepreneurial background and open-source contributions are strong positives.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across multiple languages and domains
Leadership in open-source projects (GISCollective) and entrepreneurial ventures
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling contributions at re:cinq
concerns: Recent career gap raises questions about current availability and focus
Limited direct experience with AI/cloud platform strategy or recognized AI products/platforms
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field
